what: Finance Minister to Shivaji from 1674–1680, then Royal Regent to four successive Maratha kings. He authored the Adnyapatra — a code of civil and military administration — and held the empire together across multiple dynastic transitions.
why_interesting: He outlasted four kings. His continuity was the spine of the state while rulers changed around him. This is a different kind of power than kingship — quieter, more durable, more structural. The person who writes the administrative code often shapes a civilization more than the person on the throne.
uncertainty: What does the Adnyapatra actually contain? Is it still read or studied? How did he navigate serving four kings without being purged by any of them?
